name: real-projects-leak
description: Real C memory-leak cases mined from upstream leak-fix commits. The leak-fix-commit oracle: the pre-fix revision at the changed allocation site is a flaw (actual:true); the post-fix revision is clean (actual:false). Paired positive/negative at the same location — the cleanest possible ground truth. Materialized cases are git-ignored (regenerable via scripts/real-projects/ingest.ts).

records.description: p.buffer (global_hooks.allocate) leaks on the `!print_value` early-return path; fix 2a3a313 adds global_hooks.deallocate(p.buffer) before `return NULL`.
target (cJSON_CreateObject) leaks when a recursive merge returns NULL (`replacement == NULL` path); fix f50dafc adds cJSON_Delete(target) before `return NULL`.
